final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a tropical resort hotel pool scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a tropical resort aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include an infinity pool, lounge chairs with umbrellas, coconut trees
Scene/backdrop: must include the infinity pool overlooking the ocean, blue sky with white clouds
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, vacation-ready atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a highly saturated direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
